page: Microsoft Azure D64nds_v6 is a general-purpose, network-optimized virtual machine belonging to the Dndv6 server family. Powered by an x86_64 Intel processor, this instance features 64 dedicated vCPUs and 256.0 GB of system memory, maintaining a balanced ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. The virtual machine runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

For storage-intensive workloads, the instance includes 3780 GB of local disk storage and is capable of utilizing Premium Storage. This combination of high-capacity local storage and dedicated compute resources provides a reliable foundation for data-dense operations. The hardware profile is designed to balance resource density and network throughput without the inclusion of dedicated GPU hardware.

Given its balanced memory-to-core ratio, network optimization, and substantial local storage, this server is configured for workloads such as relational databases, enterprise applications, network-heavy services, and general-purpose backend processing.
description: Microsoft Azure D64nds_v6 is a general-purpose, network-optimized virtual machine from the Dndv6 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated vCPUs on an x86_64 Intel processor, paired with 256.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. The instance is equipped with 3780 GB of local disk storage and supports Premium Storage configurations, though it lacks dedicated GPU hardware. This resource profile offers a balanced allocation of compute, memory, and high-capacity local storage, making it qualitatively cost-efficient for enterprise workloads that require high network throughput and local data caching. It is suited for database hosting, network-heavy applications, and general-purpose enterprise workloads.
